note: Guidance only — actual offers vary by company size, sector, clearance, and negotiation. Recommend verifying against current sources such as ISACA Salary Survey, Levels.fyi, or LinkedIn Salary.

modifiers.ts_sci_premium: Active TS/SCI clearance adds $20–40K in San Diego defense market
modifiers.market_note: San Diego is above national average due to concentration of defense contractors (Northrop, Leidos, SAIC, Booz Allen) and high cost of living
